# Upstream release tags that are already triaged for this standalone repository.
#
# Accepted formats (exact-match only):
#   1) <tag>
#   2) <owner/repo>@<tag>
#
# Notes:
# - Blank lines and lines starting with '#' are ignored.
# - Use tuple format when monitoring multiple upstream repos.
# - Remove an entry to allow future issue generation for that tag.

# Baseline at standalone cutover:
v1.0.0
